arts.ttl: Chelsea XI vs Flamengo – Predicted lineup and team news
arts.sum: Chelsea continue their FIFA Club World Cup campaign against Brazilian side Flamengo this evening. The West Londoners opened the tournament with a 2-0 win over Los Angeles FC and could secure progress to the knockout rounds tonight. Goals from Pedro Neto and Enzo Fernandez sealed that success, while debutant Liam Delap came off the bench […] The post Chelsea XI vs Flamengo – Predicted lineup and team news first appeared on The Football Faithful.
